columns.Name: TRANSFORMATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for HRY_EXT_TRANSFORMATION

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: For storing FLOW_INSTANCE_ID

columns.Name: SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: For storing the sequence number.

columns.Name: INSTANCE_NAME
columns.Comments: For storing instance name entered by the usr as input paameter to the ESS job

columns.Name: EXT_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_EXT_DEFINITIONS_B

columns.Name: LIBRARY_OPTION
columns.Comments: For storing library used for transformation.This parameter is entered by the user.

columns.Name: SPLIT_KEY
columns.Comments: For storing xpath of the xml tag that is needed for parsing

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TYPE
columns.Comments: For storing processing type which can be either TRANSFORMATION or VALUEMAP

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: For storing overall all status of the process.It can hold one of the values. PARSING_IN_PROGRESS/PARSING_COMPLETED/TRANSFORMATION_NOT_STARTED/TRANSFORMATION_IN_PROGRESS/TRANSFORMATION_COMPLETED/APPEND_NOT_STARTED/APPEND_IN_PROGRESS/APPEND_COMPLETED/CLEANUP_NOT_STARTED/CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS/CLEANUP_COMPLETED

columns.Name: TRANSFORMED_FILE
columns.Comments: For storing large xml that is formed after appending all the transformed sub xmls as a result of VALUE MAP transformation

columns.Name: IS_RETENTION_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: For storing retention flag which if true will reten the data for the number of days saved under retention_days column else data will be deleted as soon as the prcoess is completed.

columns.Name: RETENTION_DAYS
columns.Comments: For storing number of retention days.Maximum can be 30.

columns.Name: REQUESTID
columns.Comments: For storing the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: For storing payroll_action_id value that will be required for Value map transformation.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.
